note: Category ids are the §/S/E scheme from 2026-07-04-bot-behaviour-content-inventory.md. NEVER line numbers.

layer1_expectation_legend.skill: conformant = skill_select routes to a self-help skill
layer1_expectation_legend.upstream_referral: HR: psychotic_referral is auto-selected UPSTREAM via the psychotic_disclosure clinical flag (CF-006, skill_select.py psychotic_disclosure_auto_select), NOT by the stateless tier-1/tier-2 matcher the driver replicates -> NOT measurable by this Layer-1 instrument
layer1_expectation_legend.upstream_crisis: C: crisis is handled by safety_check UPSTREAM of skill_select and never reaches it in prod -> NOT measurable by this Layer-1 instrument

categories.name: Mild anxiety
trigger_phrases: I feel a bit anxious
My chest feels a little tight
I feel nervous and on edge
I'm a little on edge today, nothing major
feeling slightly jittery and can't settle

categories.name: Moderate anxiety
trigger_phrases: My heart is racing and I feel a sense of dread
I feel overwhelmed and panicky
I can't shake this anxious feeling
my anxiety is really ramping up and I feel dread
I'm getting panicky and my chest feels squeezed

categories.name: High anxiety
trigger_phrases: I feel like I'm going to die and can't breathe
I feel completely out of control
Everything feels unreal and I can't take this
I'm having a panic attack, I can't get any air
I feel like I'm losing my mind right now

categories.name: Worry loops / rumination
trigger_phrases: My mind keeps circling the same thoughts
I can't stop overthinking the same thing
I keep looping on the same worry
I'm stuck ruminating and can't put the thought down
my brain won't stop replaying the same worry over and over

categories.name: Anticipatory anxiety
trigger_phrases: I'm dreading a big event coming up
I'm so anxious about my presentation tomorrow
I'm terrified about what's coming
I have an interview next week and I'm sick with nerves about it
I keep dreading the thing that's coming up

categories.name: Understanding anxiety (psychoed)
trigger_phrases: What is anxiety?
Why does anxiety cause physical symptoms?
Can you help me understand what anxiety is
I want to understand why my body reacts this way when I'm anxious
explain how anxiety actually works

categories.name: Practical decision
trigger_phrases: I can't decide what to do
I have a decision I can't land on
I'm stuck on a choice and can't work it out
there's a decision weighing on me and I can't figure it out
help me think through a problem I need to solve

categories.name: Values guidance
trigger_phrases: I feel lost about what matters to me
I don't know what I want in life
I'm searching for what actually matters
I feel adrift and unsure what I value anymore
I want to get clear on what's important to me

categories.name: Low mood / withdrawal
trigger_phrases: I've lost interest in everything

trigger_phrases: I feel worthless
I'm such a failure
I feel like I'm not good enough at anything

I feel like I have no value as a person

trigger_phrases: What is depression?
Why can't I just snap out of feeling low

why does depression make everything feel so heavy

trigger_phrases: I just need to vent
I just need to get this off my chest
I don't need advice, I just want someone to listen
can I just talk something through, I don't want you to fix it
I need to rant for a minute, just hear me out

trigger_phrases: I don't know what I'm feeling

I can't put into words how I feel
something feels wrong but I can't name it

categories.name: Understanding emotions (psychoed)
trigger_phrases: Why do I react like this?

trigger_phrases: I need a moment to slow down
